executives.name: Robert "Kelly" Ortberg
executives.background: Mr. Ortberg became President and Chief Executive Officer of Boeing in August 2024. He previously served as CEO of Rockwell Collins and later as CEO of Collins Aerospace after its acquisition by United Technologies.

executives.name: Brian West
executives.background: Mr. West has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since August 2021. Prior to joining Boeing, he was CFO of Refinitiv and Oscar Health.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Stephanie Pope
executives.background: Ms. Pope is Executive Vice President and President and CEO of Boeing Commercial Airplanes. She previously served as Boeing's Chief Operating Officer and CEO of Boeing Global Services.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and President and CEO, Boeing Commercial Airplanes
Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer
Various senior leadership roles (including Vice President, Financial Planning & Analysis; Investor Relations Manager)

executives.name: Theodore "Ted" Colbert III
executives.background: Mr. Colbert was Executive Vice President and President and CEO of Boeing Defense, Space & Security. He previously served as CEO of Boeing Global Services and Chief Information Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and President and CEO, Boeing Defense, Space & Security
Various senior executive roles, including President and CEO of Boeing Defense, Space & Security (BDS)

executives.name: Christopher Raymond
executives.background: Mr. Raymond is President and CEO of Boeing Global Services. He previously served as Boeing's Chief Sustainability Officer.

tenure_dates.title: President and CEO, Boeing Global Services
Executive Vice President, President and Chief Executive Officer, Boeing Global Services (and various prior executive roles including Chief Sustainability Officer)

executives.name: Akhil Johri
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of United Technologies Corporation.

executives.name: David Calhoun
executives.background: Former President and CEO of The Boeing Company; former Executive Chairman of Nielsen Holdings plc.

executives.name: David Gitlin
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Carrier Global Corporation. Former President of Collins Aerospace.

executives.name: David Muilenburg
executives.background: Former CEO of Boeing. Note: This entry is for historical context as he is no longer on the board.

executives.name: Gregory Smith
executives.background: Gregory D. Smith has been a director since 2021. He was previously CFO and Executive Vice President of Enterprise Operations at The Boeing Company.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Finance and Corporate Controller

executives.name: Jesus Malave
executives.background: Mr. Malave has served as Chief Financial Officer since February 2022. He previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of L3Harris Technologies, Inc.

executives.name: John Richardson
executives.background: Retired Admiral, U.S. Navy and former Chief of Naval Operations.

executives.name: Laurette Koellner
executives.background: Former President of Boeing International.

tenure_dates.title: President, Boeing International; SVP; Member, Office of the Chairman

executives.name: Lawrence Kellner
executives.background: President of Emerald Creek Group, LLC and former Chairman and CEO of Continental Airlines, Inc.

executives.name: Leanne Caret
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President of The Boeing Company and President and CEO of Boeing Defense, Space & Security.

tenure_dates.title: President and CEO, Boeing Defense, Space & Security (BDS)

executives.name: Lynn Good
executives.background: Chair, President and CEO of Duke Energy Corporation. Former CFO of Duke Energy.

executives.name: Nicole Piasecki
executives.background: Former Vice President and General Manager of Propulsion Systems at Boeing Commercial Airplanes.

tenure_dates.title: Various Executive Roles (including Vice President of Business Development and Strategic Integration, President of Boeing Japan, and Vice President of Propulsion Systems)

executives.name: Norma Clayton
executives.background: Former Vice President for Learning, Training and Development at The Boeing Company.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Learning, Training and Development

executives.name: Robert Ortberg
executives.background: Former CEO of Rockwell Collins and former Special Advisor to the Office of the CEO of RTX.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Executive Officer / Director

executives.name: Rudy deLeon
executives.background: Senior Fellow at the Center for American Progress. Former Deputy Secretary of Defense.

executives.name: Sabrina Soussan
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Suez SA. Former CEO of Swisslog and Co-CEO of Siemens Mobility.

executives.name: Stayce Harris
executives.background: Retired Lieutenant General of the U.S. Air Force. Former Inspector General of the Air Force.

executives.name: Steven Mollenkopf
executives.background: Independent Chair of the Board. Former CEO of Qualcomm Incorporated. He has extensive experience in engineering and technology leadership.

executives.name: Susan Schwab
executives.background: Professor Emerita at the University of Maryland and former U.S. Trade Representative.

board_of_directors.name: Steven Mollenkopf
board_of_directors.background: Independent Chair of the Board. Former CEO of Qualcomm Incorporated. He has extensive experience in engineering and technology leadership.

board_of_directors.background: Retired Lieutenant General of the U.S. Air Force. Former Inspector General of the Air Force.

board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of United Technologies Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: David Muilenburg
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Boeing. Note: This entry is for historical context as he is no longer on the board.

board_of_directors.name: Sabrina Soussan
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of Suez SA. Former CEO of Swisslog and Co-CEO of Siemens Mobility.

board_of_directors.background: Former President and CEO of The Boeing Company; former Executive Chairman of Nielsen Holdings plc.

board_of_directors.background: Retired Admiral, U.S. Navy and former Chief of Naval Operations.

board_of_directors.background: President of Emerald Creek Group, LLC and former Chairman and CEO of Continental Airlines, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Ortberg
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Rockwell Collins and former Special Advisor to the Office of the CEO of RTX.

sources.source_description: Boeing Press Release: Kelly Ortberg Begins Role as CEO
